title: Visual audit: verify all pages follow design system
contract: Review all pages updated in T1-T10 to verify design system compliance. All pages must load without console errors. All form inputs use .input-base class. All primary buttons use .btn-primary. All secondary buttons use .btn-secondary. Cards use .card class. Typography is semantic (h1-h6, p, span with classes). Colors use CSS variables (var(--color-*)). Spacing uses CSS variables (var(--space-*)). Dark theme toggle works (if implemented). Responsive design maintained.
verify: npm run build && grep -q '.input-base\|.btn-primary\|.btn-secondary\|.card' resources/views/auth/login.blade.php && echo 'Design system classes found'
